title: Oru Ponna Parthen Mama Lyrics India Pakistan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Oru Ponna Parthen Mama Song Lyrics From India Pakistan (2014)
Singer(s): S.P.B.Charan
Music: Dheena Devarajan

Oru Ponna Parthen Mama
enna konnu puttaa maama
Ava kanna vachchi
gun-illaama suttuttaa maama

Homely lookku maama
family girl-u maama
enna marriage-ukku
aasapada vachchittaa maama.

Naan thoongum podhu
dream-il vandhu distrub pannuraa.
En mandakulla high jump panni
upset pannuraa.

Andha ponnaala en thookkam
pochu enna pannuven.

Oru Ponna Parthen Mama
enna konnu puttaa maama

Eppadi naan irundhaen - avalale
yaen ippadi aanen.
Ippadiye ponaa inimele
naan eppadi aavaen.

Pizzaa-va naan irundhaen.
piece piece-a aakkittaa.
padukka vachchi nenjumelae
scooty-ellaam otittaa.

Ava kutti saaththaan.
jagan mohini peyi.
oru madhirakkaari
ena mandhiram pottu
thnadhiramaa ava mayakkiputta
nenja norukkiputtaa.
sarakkadikka vitta
Naan kadalukku mela
cycle-a ota.

Gigantic ponnu ava style-u
enna asathudhu maamaa.
Antractic kannu adhukulla
naan vilundhtten maama

low hippu kaatti vandhaa
road-ellaam trafficu.
Lipstick-u pottu vandhaa
kannukku tonic-u.

Ava seruppu hight-u
ava jeans-o tight-u
ava smile-o bright-u
ava azhagula enna aranjittu
pora red wine-u.
ava keluththi meenu.
ava silver queen-u
ava paarththaa yaarum
polaikka maattaan.

Oru Ponna Parthen Mama
enna konnu puttaa maama
Ava kanna vachchi
gun-illaama suttuttaa maama

Homely lookku maama
family girl-u maama
enna marriage-ukku
aasapada vachchittaa maama.

Naan thoongum podhu
dream-il vandhu distrub pannuraa.
En mandakulla high jump panni
upset pannuraa.

Andha ponnaala en thookkam
pochu enna pannuven.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the playful and romantic feelings of a young man who is enamored by a girl, highlighting the excitement of love.

What is the plot context of the movie?

India Pakistan revolves around themes of love and cultural differences, with this song capturing a light-hearted moment in the narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by SPB Charan and composed by Dheena Devarajan.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 20, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Ponna Parthen Mama, the protagonist expresses his infatuation with a girl, blending humor and romance seamlessly. The song's upbeat tempo and playful lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect fit for celebratory occasions. It captures the essence of youthful love and the anticipation that comes with it. The vibrant music and engaging vocals further enhance the overall charm of this delightful track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Ponna Parthen Mama from India Pakistan is a delightful blend of catchy melodies and playful lyrics, showcasing the charm of love in a light-hearted manner. With the enchanting voice of SPB Charan and the vibrant music by Dheena Devarajan, this song captures the essence of youthful romance. Dive into this musical treat that promises to uplift your spirits and bring a smile to your face!
stanzaMeanings: I saw a girl, uncle. She has no qualities, but she has beautiful eyes.
She has a homely look, uncle. She is a family girl, uncle. Is she someone I can hope to marry, uncle?
When I sleep, she comes into my dreams and disturbs me. She makes me upset by doing high jumps in my mind.
Because of that girl, I lost my sleep. What should I do?
How did I become like this? Why did she change me? If she continues like this, how will I be in the future?
I was like a pizza, cut into pieces. I lay down and let my heart race like a scooter.
She is a little girl, a charming girl. Like a magician, she casts a spell on me and makes my heart race. If I get distracted, I ride my cycle over the waves.
That girl is gigantic, her style is amazing, uncle. I fell for her like an Antarctic creature.
When the low hipster comes, the roads are all traffic. She comes with lipstick and her eyes are like tonic.
Her shoes are high, her jeans are tight, her smile is bright. She mixes her beauty with red wine. She catches fish and is like a silver queen; no one can resist her charm.
I saw a girl, uncle. She has no qualities, but she has beautiful eyes.
She has a homely look, uncle. She is a family girl, uncle. Is she someone I can hope to marry, uncle?
When I sleep, she comes into my dreams and disturbs me. She makes me upset by doing high jumps in my mind.
Because of that girl, I lost my sleep. What should I do?
